mentions.note: CEO Jane Frasier represents great management; she has cut costs, rationalized the bank, and made Citi a perennial litter pick. Stock made new intraday high despite closing in red.
CEO Jane Frasier is executing brilliantly—cutting costs and rationalizing the bank. Stock made new intraday high despite closing in red. Bullish signal; write it down.
CEO Jane Frasier a great manager; cut costs, rationalized bank. Made new intraday high despite closing in red—very bullish signal for later.
CEO Jane Frasier executing turnaround: cutting costs, rationalizing operations, making City a litter pick. Made new intraday high despite closing down. Bullish signal; one to write down and revisit.
CEO Jane Frasier executing turnaround: cut costs, rationalized bank, made Citi perennial pick. Stock hit new intraday high despite market weakness; bullish signal.
Wall Street consensus favorite; estimates consistently too low; stock consistently jumps higher; likely biggest mover of the three major banks this week.
Solid quarter; 8% revenue growth, 35% EPS growth, best NII of all banks at 14%; turnaround 80% complete; cheapest of peers even after 66% rise; first one Cramer would buy.
Transformed from ugly duckling to beautiful swan; analysts haven't caught up with new numbers; keeps surprising upside with estimate revisions.
